name: @quoin/aesthetic-boeing-watch
description: Precision-instrumental aesthetic. Aerospace cockpit feel: deep navy panel ground, signal amber accent reserved for live indicators, instrument cream surfaces, control gray for chrome. IBM Plex Sans + IBM Plex Mono typography stack. Tight density per instrument-panel discipline. D.65 Boeing Watch primitives target this pack.
overrides-variant-token-slots: color (surface / text / accent / borders / status family)
font-sans / font-display / font-mono (IBM Plex Sans + IBM Plex Mono)
motion-* (precision timing — slightly faster than baseline)
spacing-* (1x baseline scale — instrument density preserves baseline)
radius-* (1px-2px maximum — instrument hardware is squared)
hero gradient-mesh palette overrides for the four cool/warm/monochrome/accent palettes (instrument-cool / instrument-amber / instrument-mono / instrument-signal)
